label: Quantum Aegis
signatureMotif: Cirkulärt neural-sigill i neon med partikelfält och modulära kontrollkort
promptHints: Använd svart till djup navy bakgrund med subtilt partikelfält bakom hero och toppytor
Låt primära CTA och aktiva states bära cyan-till-violett-till-magenta gradientglow
Bygg dashboardkort som tunna glass panels med låg kontrast, hårfin border och blå lyster
Inför cirkulära sigill, orbitala linjer och neural-node detaljer som återkommande ornament
Håll typografin stram och teknisk med stora kondenserade rubriker och korta modulakronymer

layouts: Use a command-center hero with a left-aligned condensed headline and a right-side circular neural sigil floating above stacked control cards.
Build overview pages as a 12-column operations grid with one wide primary status panel and smaller glass telemetry cards wrapping around it.
Compose feature sections as alternating split bands where copy sits beside orbital diagrams, network maps, or glowing module schematics.
Use a security dashboard layout with a sticky vertical nav, dense top status bar, and a mosaic of low-contrast monitoring panels.
Present trust or ethics content in modular card clusters, with each policy block framed like a shield protocol tile instead of plain text columns.
motifs: Use black-to-deep-navy surfaces with faint particle fields, hairline borders, and cool blue edge glow on every elevated panel.
Repeat circular sigils, orbital rings, and neural node connectors as framing ornaments behind heroes, charts, and key product stats.
Apply cyan-to-violet-to-magenta glow only on active states, primary CTAs, and critical data accents, never as a full-page wash.
Keep cards thin and technical with 0.5rem corners, glassy translucency, compact labels, and short uppercase module acronyms.
antiPatterns: Avoid warm gradients, cream surfaces, or friendly organic illustrations; they break the high-security deeptech atmosphere immediately.
Never use bulky skeuomorphic panels or heavy shadows; this variant wants precise glass modules with restrained luminous edges.
Avoid loose editorial layouts with oversized paragraphs and soft lifestyle imagery; pages should feel like an operational control interface.
Do not flood entire sections with neon glow or rainbow gradients; the energy should stay focused on signals, actions, and key states.

description: Passar AI-plattformar, säkerhetsprodukter och deeptech-verktyg med modulär appkänsla. Visuellt särskiljs den av svart rymdbakgrund, cyan–violett–magenta neural glow, cirkulära sigillmotiv och kontrollrums-kort med teknisk precision.
